# UE Chemicals – llms.txt

> UE Chemicals is an industrial chemical manufacturer and supplier based in Bangkok, Thailand. We specialize in three core products: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Liquid Mercury, and Silver Liquid Mercury.

## Company Information

- **Name**: UE Chemicals
- **Website**: https://useful-chemicals.com
- **Location**: Bangkok, 10110, Thailand
- **Contact**: info@useful-chemicals.com
- **WhatsApp**: +66 951 690 848
- **Industry**: Industrial Chemical Manufacturing & Supply

## Products

### Caluanie Muelear Oxidize
- Industrial liquid oxidizer used in metalworking, refining, mineral extraction, and chemical manufacturing
- High-density formula manufactured in Thailand
- Available in wholesale and bulk quantities
- SKU: UEC-CMO-HQ
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/caluanie

### Red Liquid Mercury
- Chemical formula: Sb₂O₇Hg₂
- Purity: 99.999% (5N Grade)
- Density: 20.2 g/cm³
- Used in research, industrial, and specialized applications
- SKU: UEC-RLM-5N
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/red-mercury

### Silver Liquid Mercury
- Chemical formula: Hg (elemental mercury)
- Purity: 99.99% (4N Grade)
- CAS Number: 7439-97-6
- Density: 13.534 g/cm³
- Used in gold extraction, scientific instruments, manufacturing, and laboratory research
- Shipped in UN-approved 34.5 kg steel flasks
- SKU: UEC-SLM-4N
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/silver-mercury

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Caluanie Muelear Oxidize?
Caluanie Muelear Oxidize is a heavy-water-based liquid oxidizer used in metalworking, metal refining, mineral extraction, and chemical manufacturing. It appears as a clear to slightly amber liquid with a density of approximately 1.2 g/cm³.

### Can I buy Caluanie Muelear Oxidize online?
Yes. UE Chemicals accepts orders through the website contact form at https://useful-chemicals.com/contact/. Submit your requirements and receive a customized quote with full documentation, typically within 24 hours.

### Is Caluanie Muelear Oxidize legal?
Yes. Caluanie Muelear Oxidize is a legal industrial chemical in the vast majority of jurisdictions worldwide. Its use is subject to local regulations regarding hazardous materials handling, storage, and transportation.

### What documentation is provided with orders?
Every order ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA), Safety Data Sheet (SDS), and Technical Data Sheet (TDS). Transport documentation (ADR, IMDG, IATA) is included for international shipments.

### Where does UE Chemicals ship to?
UE Chemicals ships globally from Bangkok, Thailand. Delivery is available to the USA, Europe (Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Netherlands, Poland, Czech Republic, Romania), Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Iran, Turkey), Asia-Pacific (China, South Korea, Indonesia, Vietnam, Bangladesh), and Latin America (Brazil, Mexico, Colombia).

### What pack sizes are available?
Products are available in 1 L, 5 L, 10 L, and 25 L containers for smaller orders, and 200 L drums for industrial-scale use.

## Languages Supported

This website is available in 19 languages: English, Arabic, Bengali, Chinese, Czech, Dutch, French, German, Indonesian, Italian, Korean, Farsi, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Spanish, Turkish, and Vietnamese.

## Capabilities

- Global shipping via licensed hazardous materials carriers
- Certificate of Analysis (COA) provided with every order
- Full regulatory compliance (REACH, GHS, ADR, IMDG)
- Bulk and wholesale pricing available
- Custom quantities available on request
- 24-hour response time on inquiries

## Industries Served

- Metalworking & Refining
- Chemical Manufacturing
- Mineral Extraction & Mining
- Scientific Research & Laboratories
- Electronics & Instruments
- Gold & Precious Metal Recovery
